content.full_text:
State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

January 28, 1977

Thomas F. Winfield III, Esq.
Ebben and Brown
615 South Flower Street, Suite 1201
Los Angeles, CA 90017

Dear Mr. Winfield:

Please excuse my delay in responding to your letter
of January 6, 1977. It apparently was misplaced when it ar-
rived and I just received it.

I think your letter accurately reflects the sub-
stance of our telephone conversation concerning the applica-
tion of 2 Cal. Adm. Code Section 18202 to certain activities
engaged in by Drs. Keilin and Gundlach. I do want to reiterate,
however, that with respect to proceedings under California
Water Code Section 13260 my advice was premised on the under-
standing that the discharge requirements relate to a single
company or entity and involve an attempt by the company or en-
tity to obtain a permit to discharge at a certain level. If,
on the other hand, a proceeding involves an attempt to in-
fluence a regional quality control board or the state board
with respect to discharge requirements that would have general
applicability, time spent influencing this type of decision
would fall within the time requirements specified in 2 Cal.
Adm. Code Section 18239.

I assume this will conclude this matter. If, however,
you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to con-
tact me.

Sincerely,

Kenneth Finney
Chief
Legal Division

KF: jo

cc: John Greenwood

TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE-ADMINISTRATION / 9 1 6 ) 3 2 2 - 5 6 6 0 • EXECUTIVE-LEGAL / 9 1 6 ) 3 2 2 - 5 6 6 0 • ENFORCEMENT / 9 1 6 ) 3 2 2 - 5 6 6 0

FPPC

LAW OFFICES
EBBEN AND BROWN
615 SOUTH FLOWER STREET, SUITE 1201
LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA 90017

ORANGE COUNTY OFFICE
1830 UNION BANK BUILDING
610 NEWPORT CENTER DRIVE
NEWPORT BEACH, CALIFORNIA 92660
TELEPHONE (714) 644-4181

LEO G. EBBEN
TIMOTHY K. REULEN
J. KENNETH FINNEY
THOMAS P. WINFIELD III
ANTHONY CANZONERI

TELEPHONE (213) 624-1001

January 6, 1977


Kenneth Finney, Esq.
Fair Political Practice Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, California 95814

Re: Withdrawal from Lobbyist Status -
    Bert Keilin, PhD and
    Paul Gundlach, PhD.
    Request for Further and More Specific Advice

Dear Mr. Finney:

     This letter will serve to confirm our telephone
conversation of this date regarding my request for advice to
Mr. John C. Greenwood, Program Coordinator for the Fair
Political Practices Commission contained in my letters to
him of October 5, 1976 and November 23, 1976, in which it
was agreed as follows:

     That as a matter of law, the time expended by
Drs. Keilin and Gundlach in attempting to influence the
content of any particular discharge requirement as it involves
any particular discharger, pursuant to California Water Code
§ 13260, et seq., or in responding to or attempting to influence
proposed cease and desist orders, pursuant to California Water
Code § 13301, does not constitute time which must be computed
in determining whether or not these individuals are lobbyists
pursuant to the four tests set forth in 2 California Administrative Code § 18239.

     I recognize and appreciate that you express no opinion
as to whether or not Drs. Keilin and Gundlach are lobbyists,
but merely are providing me advice as to whether or not the
time spent by them on the two above-referenced matters, to wit,
waste discharge requirements and cease and desist orders, must
be considered and computed by them in determining whether or not
they meet the tests set forth in the regulations.

Kenneth Finney, Esq.
January 7, 1977
Page 2


     In accordance with our discussion of this date, Drs.
Gundlach and Keilin have determined that they have never met
any of the four above-referenced tests for registration as a
lobbyist, and are therefore filing a Withdrawal of Lobbyist
registration pursuant to Section 18601 of the Commission Regula-
tions.

     Again, thank you very much for both your cooperation
and that of John Greenwood.

                              Very truly yours,

                              [signature]
                              THOMAS F. WINFIELD III

TFW/pla
CC. Mr. John C. Greenwood
    Dr. Bert Keilin
    Dr. Paul Gundlach
